title: Dhurandhar Impact: Ex-SP MLA Pooja Pal Makes Explosive Claim, Says Gangster Atiq Ahmad Financed Akhilesh Yadav
description: Former Samajwadi Party (SP) MLA Pooja Pal alleged that gangster-politician Atiq Ahmad financed the Akhilesh Yadav-led party in Uttar Pradesh. This comes as Bollywood movie 'Dhurandhar-2' portrays a character called 'Atif Ahmad', who is purportedly inspired by the real-life gangster.
